signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Signup is currently invite-only.
signup.inviteDetected: Invite detected. You can finish creating your account.
signup.inviteRequired: You need a valid invitation link to sign up.
signup.usernameHelp: Usernames are permanent and cannot be changed.
signup.usernameTitle: 5–20 characters. Letters, numbers, and underscores only.

errors.usernameShort: Username must be at least 5 characters.
errors.inviteOnly: Signup is invite-only right now. Please use the invite link from your email.

verifyEmail.title: Check your email
verifyEmail.description: We sent a verification link to your inbox. Click it, or paste the token below to confirm your account.
